meaning: adj.大学或四年制中学之二年级的,一知半解的
examples: Do you really believe that sophomoric argument?
Some men resort to sophomoric behavior like this because they are socially awkward and perhaps even insecure around women.
Did I sound sophomoric, or like someone who knew what he was talking about?
Instead they focus on sophomoric framing of the controversy as an environmental problem but ignore the larger picture.
Sophomoric, perhaps, but clever enough to catch the attention of the Today show, which devoted a segment to the ad on Friday April 12.
